title: Gallery Conversation: What Makes a Hero?
short_description: What makes a hero, and who gets to be one? Join museum educators Katie Barko and Gaby Lavalle in this gallery conversation where art becomes a window into the diverse dimensions of heroism.
description:
What makes a hero, and who gets to be one? Join museum educators Katie Barko and Gaby Lavalle in this gallery conversation where art becomes a window into the diverse dimensions of heroism. Together we will discuss the ambiguity, construction, and narratives of heroes and challenge our perceptions. 

This gallery conversation is given entirely in English. 

Esta conversación en galerías será en inglés. Acompáñanos el 5 de abril a las 2:00 para el mismo programa en español.
